visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind other items.
A yellow lemon positioned in the front, obscuring the view of the items behind it.
A green soda can to the left of the water bottle and in front of it.
A red soda can to the right of the water bottle and in front of it.
A brown paper bag in the background behind all the items.

action_plan.explanation: The yellow lemon is the closest object to the camera and blocks access to all items behind it. It must be removed first.
The green soda can is blocking the front-left side of the water bottle and must be cleared to create a path.
The red soda can is blocking the front-right side of the water bottle and must be cleared to create a path.
All obstructions have been removed, providing clear access to the water bottle.
